title: Historical PM Ops Metrics Export Schedule Scrape
historical_note: This packet records one bounded PM ops-metrics export schedule-scrape slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.

objective: Implement the smallest bounded follow-on to packet 019i by adding one deployment-side scheduled metrics-export path that scrapes the two existing read-only PM ops endpoints, `GET /api/v1/ops/pm-idempotency/stats` and `GET /api/v1/ops/pm-idempotency/by-route`, on a fixed cadence without changing application-runtime code, adding DDL, adding PM write endpoints, or reopening `work.wbs_nodes` writes.
active_role: PM Ops Metrics Export Schedule Scrape Author
constrained_outputs: One bounded deployment-side schedule artifact that scrapes the two existing read-only PM ops endpoints on a fixed cadence and on demand without adding any application-runtime endpoint, background worker, or database write path

One minimal environment contract for the scheduled exporter path, using a repo-level base URL variable and no auth header because the existing ops endpoints are already read-only unauthenticated surfaces
One operator runbook documenting how the scheduled exporter works, what it records or emits, and how to invoke it on demand without changing the application runtime

Focused validation evidence proving no application-runtime files changed, `/api/v1/work/*` path count remains 15, `/api/v1/ops/*` path count remains 2, and both existing ops endpoints remain GET-only and unchanged
validation_steps: Confirm packet 019j stays bounded to deployment-side schedule scraping of the two existing PM ops endpoints and does not modify application-runtime code, add new endpoints, or reopen `work.wbs_nodes` writes

Confirm the scheduled artifact reuses only the existing `GET /api/v1/ops/pm-idempotency/stats` and `GET /api/v1/ops/pm-idempotency/by-route` surfaces rather than introducing a second metrics implementation path
Confirm no DDL, migration edits, or changes to the `pm.idempotency_keys` schema are introduced

Confirm packet-019g, packet-019h, and packet-019i runtime and observability surfaces remain unchanged and that `/api/v1/work/*` path count stays at 15 while `/api/v1/ops/*` stays at 2 after the exporter schedule lands
sql_permission_note: Packet 019j is deployment-side only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, runtime route changes, or broader PM write-surface expansion are authorized.
